title: Device Home Screen - Unsupported device
scenario: Unsupported device (e.g., BB Fit, Sync 60) appears in the Poly Studio Mobile app home screen device list despite not being manageable by the app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Pair and connect an unsupported device (e.g., BB Fit, Sync 60) via Bluetooth.
Observe the device list on the Home screen.
expected: The unsupported device (e.g., BB Fit, Sync 60) should NOT appear in the device list on the Home screen, as the app does not support managing that device.
